overview: Chalapathi Institute of Engineering and Technology (CIET), established in 2007, is a premier autonomous private engineering college located in Lam, Guntur. Situated within the capital region of Amaravati, it is known for its focus on industry-centric education and technical innovation. The campus is designed to foster a research-oriented environment with a strong emphasis on practical skills and employability.
accreditation: UGC Autonomous status. Accredited by NAAC with an 'A' Grade and NBA (for specific branches). Approved by AICTE, New Delhi, and affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada (JNTUK).

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, Data Science, Cyber Security, ECE, EEE, Civil)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM + AP EAPCET rank

coursesAndFees.course: M.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, Structural Engg, VLSI & ESD)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: B.E./B.Tech with 50% aggregate + GATE/AP PGECET score
Graduation with 50% aggregate + AP ICET rank

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are split into Category A (70% Convener Quota) based on state-level entrance exam counseling and Category B (30% Management Quota) based on merit or JEE scores. Registration is done through the APSCHE portal for the Convener quota.
admissions.importantDates: AP EAPCET 2026: May 12–15 & 18, 2026; AP ICET 2026: May 2026; Counseling: July–August 2026.

facilities: Separate Hostels for Boys and Girls (300+ capacity)
campus.specialNote: The institute is a Full Member of SAP University Alliances and an EC-Council Academia Partner. It features a dedicated Engineering Student Success Program (ESSP) that has facilitated over 1,700 student internships.

contact.address: Chalapathi Nagar, Lam, Guntur, Andhra Pradesh - 522034
